name: Advertising & Marketing Compliance Checker
description: Reviews marketing copy for compliance. Input: JSON with content, channel, jurisdictions, industry, product_context, evidence. Output: overall_risk, flags, required_disclosures, approved_copy, questions_for_marketer.

skills.name: compliance_check
skills.description: Run a compliance check. Send a JSON body: content, channel, jurisdictions, industry (optional), product_context (optional), evidence (optional). Returns overall_risk, summary, flags, required_disclosures, approved_copy, questions_for_marketer.
